items.title: Operation Magaqa: Anatomy of a Cover-Up
items.summary: Nine years after the assassination of ANC Youth League Secretary-General Sindiso Magaqa, a pattern of deliberate obstruction has emerged — culminating in the arrest of a sitting MP for interfering with the murder probe.
items.author: ZA-DIVERGENT Analyst

items.title: KZN HAWKS: Three Signals, One Pattern
items.summary: Three independent signals from the KZN Directorate for Priority Crime Investigation — a cocaine theft, a R200m drug disappearance, and commission testimony about protocol failures — converge on a single conclusion: systemic evidence-handling compromise within South Africa's elite crime unit.
items.author: ZA-DIVERGENT Analyst

items.title: R21 Billion and a Wig Store: The Eskom Diesel Fraud
items.summary: AmaBhungane's investigation into a R21 billion Eskom diesel contract reveals a front company operated by a 24-year-old psychology graduate who simultaneously sold wigs online. The procurement structure raises systemic questions about state-owned enterprise due diligence.
items.author: ZA-DIVERGENT Analyst

items.title: SAPS Madlanga task team arrest Julius Mkhwanazi for fraud and corruption - TimesLIVE
items.summary: Julius Mkhwanazi was arrested by the SAPS Madlanga task team in April 2026 on charges of fraud and corruption. The arrest is part of a broader investigation into Limpopo municipal procurement irregularities. The Madlanga...
